name: Drumstick

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: In a Cloud of Dust
abilities.text: After resolving an action that targeted and damaged this model, it may discard a card to move up to 5".

abilities.name: Ramming Speed
abilities.text: This model's (melee) actions generated by the Charge action receive +1 Skl and any one suit to its final duel totals.

actions.name: "Up We Go!"
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Falling Skies
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage and be moved up to 2". Then, remove the target.

actions.name: Fly With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target a friendly model within 2".
actions.effects: Place this model within range. If this action received a raise, place the target (if any) in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: Falling Skies: The '(r)' before '2"' in the effects text indicates a range marker, parsed as '(r)2"' in the text.
